meta.title: GodCode - Build your online store in minutes
meta.description: Digital menu, cart, delivery, POS, kitchen orders and inventory for your business. No coding, no sales commissions. Start free.

footer.brandDescription: Everything your business needs to sell online. Menu, cart, POS, inventory and more.

layout.securityFooter: Protected with email verification and SSL encryption.

start.title: Register your business
start.subtitle: Complete your details and we will send you a verification email.

contactBranch.subtitle: Which location do you want information from?

delivery.locationSavedCompleteManually: Location saved. Complete street and district manually if needed.
delivery.permissionDenied: Permission denied. Allow location in your browser settings.
delivery.noSignal: No location signal. Type street and district.
delivery.timeout: Timeout reached. Try again or type your address.
delivery.cannotReadLocation: We could not read your location. Type street and district.
delivery.addressFoundReview: Address found. Review street, district and shipping cost.
delivery.howReceiveOrder: How would you like to receive your order
delivery.fulfillmentSubtitle: Choose an option to continue checkout.
delivery.writeStreetNumberCommune: Type street, number and district/city; we will calculate the fee based on the store zones.
delivery.fullAddressHint: Enter your full address (street and number and, if possible, district/city). With that we can quote shipping and coordinate your order on WhatsApp.
delivery.approxHintPrefix: This suggestion is only area/city level: the map point may be far from your door. Prefer a more specific address option, adjust street or district/city, or use
delivery.updatingLocationFromStreet: Updating location from street and number (recalculating shipping)...
delivery.driverInstructionsMin: Minimum {min} characters so the driver can find you.
delivery.locationExceedsMaxKm: Your location exceeds this store's maximum distance.
delivery.pickupOnlyBranch: This branch only allows in-store pickup.
delivery.needLocationForUber: To quote shipping (Uber), place the point on the map or tap Use current location.
delivery.needLocationStreetOrKm: Set your location on the map, type street and number with district/city, or enter km manually to continue.
delivery.locationOutsideArea: Your location is outside this store's delivery area.

errors.noOrdersNow: Orders are not available right now.
